name: Moroccan Chickpeas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, sauté onions in water with 1/4 teaspoon veggie broth.
2. Add garbanzos and enough cold water (or canned tomatoes) to cover the beans.
3. Stir in the remaining vegetable broth, bay leaf, garlic, onion, parsley, cinnamon, ginger, turmeric, and pepper.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the chickpeas are tender.
5. Add raisins to taste.
6. Serve with brown basmati rice or enjoy on its own.
